text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
A whole week of rest, huh... What was I thinking,
letting myself get hurt like this?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I knew I was exhausted, but I was worried I'd fall
behind if I didn't train more, and I just...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but don't worry—I can still do some training!
I'm pretty sure the doctor was blowing this whole
thing out of proportion.
choice_data_list: I'd rather you rest for now.
A sturdy mindset can overcome any injury!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But I already train less than everyone else
because of my modeling job...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
If I have to sit around and rest, I'm literally going
to go insane!
choice_data_list:
I'll work out a special training regimen for after
you've recovered.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... It's frustrating, but I understand. I'll talk to
my manager about my schedule too.
And so, Gold City is forced to take some time off.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Whoa. Why are you so fired up all of a sudden? I
mean... it's not that I don't understand.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Can't let an injury slow us down. We've got to get
back to the track and—
choice_data_list: Take it slow though! Or else you'll—

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
No way... It hurts just to walk. I can't train
properly like this...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Am I supposed to just sit here and do nothing?

Although the reality disheartens her, I tell Gold
City her priority is to recover from her injury.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Can't let an injury slow us down. We've got to
get—
choice_data_list:
—back to the infirmary and have a strategy
meeting.

—back to the infirmary and have a strategy
meeting.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What happened to overcoming my injury with a
sturdy mindset?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: No, wait... I'm sorry. I'm being careless. It's important to consider how I go about recovering, right?

After that, the two of us work out a training
regimen she can perform while injured. It might be
a light load, but it'll still contribute toward her
progress.
